name: Cappuccino Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Butter 12 large muffin cups.
2. In a bowl, whisk together the cake flour, all-purpose flour, cocoa powder, brown sugar, sugar, baking powder, and decaffeinated coffee.
3. In another bowl, beat the butter, half-and-half, sour cream, and eggs until smooth.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring in the orange zest and chopped bittersweet chocolate until just combined.
5. Carefully fill each prepared muffin cup 2/3 full with batter.
6. Bake for 15 minutes or until the tops are firm.
